properties.mapping SurgicalProcedure_Code:
SELECT 	"Dataset_Identifier" AS datasetId,
		'original_data.op_kir_axill' AS propertyNameOriginal,
		"original_data.op_kir_axill" AS originalValue,
		'SurgicalProcedure_Code' AS propertyNameEUCAIM,
        "SurgicalProcedure_Code" AS codeInEUCAIM,
		CAST(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS VARCHAR) AS mappingTimestamp
FROM FLOWFILE
properties.entity:Tumor:
SELECT 	"Dataset_Identifier" AS DatasetIdentifier,
		"Patient_Identifier" || '_tumor_1' as Identifier,
		"PrimaryCancerCondition_Identifier" AS PrimaryCancerConditionIdentifier,
		'Breast' AS BodySiteOriginal,
		"Tumor_BodySiteCode" AS BodySiteEUCAIM,
		"Tumor_BodySiteLaterality" AS BodySiteLateralityQualifierEUCAIM,
		"original_data.a_pat_sida" AS BodySiteLateralityQualifierOriginal,
		"Tumor_HistologicGrade" AS HistologicGradeEUCAIM,
		"original_data.op_pad_nhg" AS HistologicGradeOriginal,
		'0' AS Processed
FROM FLOWFILE
properties.entity:Patient:
SELECT 	"Dataset_Identifier" AS DatasetIdentifier,
		"Patient_Identifier" AS Identifier,
		"decision" AS	DiagnosticCategoryOriginal,
		"Patient_DiagnosticCategory" AS DiagnosticCategoryEucaim,
		"dicom_tags.PatientSex.Value" AS BirthSexOriginal,
        "Patient_BirthSex" AS BirthSexEucaim,
		'0' AS Processed
FROM FLOWFILE
properties.mapping Patient_BirthSex:
SELECT 	"Dataset_Identifier" AS datasetId,
		'dicom_tags.PatientSex.Value' AS propertyNameOriginal,
		"dicom_tags.PatientSex.Value" AS originalValue,
		'Patient_BirthSex' AS propertyNameEUCAIM,
        "Patient_BirthSex" AS codeInEUCAIM,
		CAST(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS VARCHAR) AS mappingTimestamp
FROM FLOWFILE
properties.mapping PrimaryCancerCondition_Histology:
SELECT 	"Dataset_Identifier" AS datasetId,
		'original_data.op_pad_insitusnomed' AS propertyNameOriginal,
		"original_data.op_pad_insitusnomed" AS originalValue,
		'PrimaryCancerCondition_HistologyMorphologyCode' AS propertyNameEUCAIM,
        "PrimaryCancerCondition_HistologyMorphologyCode" AS codeInEUCAIM,
		CAST(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS VARCHAR) AS mappingTimestamp
FROM FLOWFILE
properties.entity: Primary Cancer Condition:
SELECT 	"Dataset_Identifier" AS DatasetIdentifier,
		"Patient_Identifier" AS PatientIdentifier,
		"PrimaryCancerCondition_Identifier" AS Identifier,
		CAST(REPLACE("PrimaryCancerCondition_AgeAtDiagnosis", ',', '.') AS DOUBLE) AS AgeOfDiagnosis,
		'Year' AS AgeUnitOriginal,
		"PrimaryCancerCondition_Code" AS primarycancerconditioneucaim,
		"PrimaryCancerCondition_Code" AS primarycancerconditionoriginal,
		"PrimaryCancerCondition_HistologyMorphologyCode" AS histologymorphologybehavioureucaim,
		"original_data.op_pad_insitusnomed" AS histologymorphologybehaviouroriginal,
		"PrimaryCancerCondition_AssertedDate" AS AssertedDate,
		'0' AS Processed
FROM FLOWFILE
properties.mapping PrimaryCancerCondition_Code:
SELECT 	"Dataset_Identifier" AS datasetId,
		'Cancer type' AS propertyNameOriginal,
		"Cancer type" AS originalValue,
		'PrimaryCancerCondition_Code' AS propertyNameEUCAIM,
        "PrimaryCancerCondition_Code" AS codeInEUCAIM,
		CAST(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS VARCHAR) AS mappingTimestamp
FROM FLOWFILE
properties.mapping Patient_DiagnosticCategory:
SELECT 	"Dataset_Identifier" AS datasetId,
		'decision' AS propertyNameOriginal,
		"decision" AS originalValue,
		'Patient_DiagnosticCategory' AS propertyNameEUCAIM,
        "Patient_DiagnosticCategory" AS codeInEUCAIM,
		CAST(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS VARCHAR) AS mappingTimestamp
FROM FLOWFILE
properties.entity: SurgicalProcedure:
SELECT 	"Dataset_Identifier" AS DatasetIdentifier,
		"Patient_Identifier" AS PatientIdentifier,
		"SurgicalProcedure_Identifier" AS TreatmentIdentifier,
		"SurgicalProcedure_Code" AS	procedureeucaim,
        "original_data.op_kir_axill" AS procedureoriginal,
		'0' AS Processed
FROM FLOWFILE
properties.entity:Dataset:
SELECT 	"Dataset_Identifier" AS Identifier,
		"Dataset_Title" AS Title,
		"Dataset_Description" AS Description,
		'0' as Processed
FROM FLOWFILE

labels.label:
Loop 03 for clinical data (SAS breast dataset):
* Clinical data input normalized and curated is loaded and converted to a relational model.
* Specific mappings are specified during the Data Holder's analysis phase.
Steps:
1. Read normalized and curated csv file and apply structural mapping preparation
2. Apply lookups for coded values
3. Write values transformed to EUCAIM CDM and hyperontology to ingestion database
